news.title: Wholesale inflation jumps 6% in April on annual basis, biggest increase since 2022
news.summary: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.5% in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus. The consumer price index is expected to rise 0.4%.

news.title: Trump arrives in Beijing with CEOs ahead of Xi meetings
news.summary: The president landed in the Chinese capital for a highly anticipated summit with Xi Jinping. The meeting will take place at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing.

news.title: Altman details Musk's OpenAI fallout, says nonprofit was 'left for dead'

news.title: Jamie Dimon warns JPMorgan may rethink new London office if 'very smart' Starmer is ousted as UK PM
news.summary: Starmer's leadership is under pressure, sparking concern in the bond market. Starmer: 'I will not resign. I will continue to lead the government'

news.title: Anduril doubles valuation to over $60 billion as defense tech funding boom continues
news.summary: The company is working on space-based interceptors for Trump's $185 billion Golden Dome defense system. The company is also working on a $200 billion system for the U.S. Air Force.

news.title: ‘I have zero envy’: I’m 75, enjoy working and live below my means. Why are more people not like me?
news.summary: “I did two basic things right: I married the right person and chose a trade I can practice until I die,” he says.

news.title: Why 3.8% inflation actually feels like an 8% hit to your retirement savings

Official CPI masksdouble-digit spike in healthcare,. insurance andEnergy. Meanwhile,. your out-of-date strategy quietly draining your portfolio, experts say.

news.title: Is AI power really the new oil? Soon it will trade just like a commodity.
news.summary: CME Group plans to launch futures that would let investors bet on the price of computing power. CME Group: Futures would allow investors to bet on computing power prices.

news.title: Inflation is now rising faster than your salary. Here’s how long that could last.
